Thanks Indian Oil for the best service and support.

station_address: Dr Annie Besant Rd, Lotus Colony, Worli, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400018
text: I have been filling petrol from here for the last 5 years. Today when I asked him to fill my petrol tank, he told me that after seeing zero, the number started directly from 16. When I questioned him on this, he said that you are lying and started talking rudely and did not even fill air in my bike.

station_address: Dr Annie Besant Rd, Lotus Colony, Worli, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400018
text: Worst staff.... I practically fill my 2 wheeler  petrol from this place every week..... Nobody comes to fill the tank unless and untill u yell at them and call them.... The same applies specially for getting PUC done... And now from the time these 2000 rs notes withdrawal has started.... They just refuse to accept that note giving silly excuses.. Abt chutta nahi hai....

station_address: Dr Annie Besant Rd, Lotus Colony, Worli, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400018
text: Never stops surprising me with excellent services. Even the tyre air (nitrogen), puncture repair guy is cooperative; flattened and refilled Nitrogen in all 4, mistake due to communication gap from rolled up Windows due to COVID. Had a small issue due to credit card once, but overall, excellent service.
